_note: Editorial — hand-edited by WPR. Each event: {date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', month: 'May', day: '28', title: '...', desc: '...', tags: ['promo'|'theme'|'community'|'fireworks'|...]}.

events.title: Home Opener vs Green Bay Rockers
events.desc: Opening night at Athletic Park! Wisconsin Lottery hat giveaway for the first 500 fans 18 and older. First pitch at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Thunder Bay Border Cats Visit Wausau
events.desc: The Border Cats make their cross-border trip to Athletic Park for a two-game series (Jun 9-10).

events.title: Doubleheader at Eau Claire
events.desc: Two games in one day at Carson Park! Game 1 at 12:05 PM, Game 2 at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Kenosha Kingfish Visit Wausau
events.desc: The Kingfish visit Athletic Park for a two-game series ahead of Independence Day weekend.

events.title: Independence Day Celebration
events.desc: Celebrate the 4th of July at Athletic Park! Woodchucks host the Madison Mallards at 6:05 PM.

events.title: NWL All-Star Break — Home Run Challenge
events.desc: The Home Run Challenge kicks off at the Field of Dreams movie site in Dyersville, Iowa.

events.title: NWL All-Star Game — Field of Dreams
events.desc: The 2026 NWL All-Star Game at the new ballpark on the iconic Field of Dreams movie site.

events.title: Road Trip to Thunder Bay, Ontario
events.desc: The Woodchucks head north of the border for a two-game series at Port Arthur Stadium (Jul 16-17).

events.title: 7-Game Homestand Begins
events.desc: Longest homestand of 2026! Duluth (Jul 21-22), Green Bay DH (Jul 23), Eau Claire (Jul 24-25), WI Rapids (Jul 26).

events.title: Doubleheader vs Green Bay Rockers
events.desc: Two games at Athletic Park! Game 1 at 12:05 PM, Game 2 at 6:35 PM.

events.title: Minnesota Mud Puppies Visit Wausau
events.desc: The NWL's travel team visits Athletic Park for the final home series of the regular season.

events.title: Regular Season Home Finale
events.desc: Last chance to catch the Woodchucks at Athletic Park this summer! Mud Puppies at 5:05 PM.
